emails.subject: TW ROFR Meeting
emails.body: TW ROFR Meeting If possible, can we reschedule our meeting from Wednesday (10/4) to tomorrow at 1pm since I have completed TW invoice review this afternoon. I am hoping to possibly take Wednesday off if I can shift my meetings. Let me know if there's a conflict. Thanks, Elizabeth x3-6928
